---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect guidance, broken links, or template errors
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what's wrong.

## Which file(s) are affected?

- `path/to/file.md`

## What's the expected behavior?

What should the file say or do instead?

## What actually happens?

What does the agent do wrong because of this issue?

## AI Agent Used

- [ ] Claude (Anthropic)
- [ ] GPT (OpenAI)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, agent transcripts, or links to relevant standards.
